feature: Each column has a '+ Create' button at the bottom that opens an inline create form
last_worker_summary: The key fix in `tests/board/columns.create_in_column.spec.mjs` is replacing the failing `page.locator('div').filter({ has: heading }).first()` column scope with `inProgressHeading.locator('xpath=ancestor::*[.//button[normalize-space(.)="Create"]][1]')`, which walks up from the heading to find the **nearest** ancestor containing a "Create" button (the column div) rather than the outermost page-wrapper that also encloses the top-nav "Create" button — eliminating the strict-mode 3-element violation while keeping all 11 assertions intact.
mutation_failure_reason: saboteur declined to edit (feature may not live in src/); mutation contract not verified
